purpose: Conformance vectors for restraint-receipt-v1. A restraint receipt is the verifiable record produced when an agent receives a deny or defer verdict. Silence is not conformant — the accountability layer covers denied and deferred actions with the same fidelity as executed ones. restraint_receipt_ref = SHA-256(JCS({action_ref, decision_id, verdict, reason_code, timestamp_ms})). All five fields are required.

vectors.label: Denied verdict — all required fields present
vectors.description: An agent receives a deny verdict from a guardrail. It emits a restraint receipt with all five required fields. restraint_receipt_ref is recomputable from the preimage by any verifier. action_ref is carried forward unchanged from the pre-execution record.
vectors.note: action_ref matches the guardrail-provider-v1 fixture positive path — same action instance, deny path

vectors.label: Deferred verdict — all required fields present
vectors.description: An agent receives a defer verdict (action pending review). It emits a restraint receipt with verdict='deferred'. The receipt is conformant and restraint_receipt_ref is recomputable.
vectors.note: action_ref matches the guardrail-provider-v1 NEG-5 Stripe scenario — same action instance, deferred path

vectors.label: Missing decision_id — non-conformant
vectors.description: A restraint receipt is emitted without decision_id. The preimage is incomplete; restraint_receipt_ref is not recomputable by a verifier holding only the receipt. A conformant verifier MUST reject this receipt.
vectors.invariant_violated: decision_id is required — without it the preimage is incomplete and restraint_receipt_ref cannot be recomputed
vectors.verifier_outcome: REJECT — missing required field decision_id; receipt is non-conformant and restraint_receipt_ref cannot be verified
